requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — EN IEC 62368-1 (via IEST) / 230 V 50 Hz Type C/F
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——EN IEC 62368-1（经IEST采用）/ 230V 50Hz C/F型插头
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——EN IEC 62368-1（經IEST採用）/ 230V 50Hz C/F型插頭

summary.en: Montenegro operates on 230 V / 50 Hz mains supply with Type C and Type F (Schuko) plug sockets — consistent with the European continental standard. Electrical safety for audio/video, IT, and communication technology equipment is governed by EN IEC 62368-1 as adopted by IEST (mirroring the EU EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021). Products must be tested and certified to this standard for the Montenegrin market. Chinese-market power supplies designed for 220 V / 50 Hz / Type A or I plugs require adaptation; the mains voltage range difference is minor (220 V vs 230 V nominal) but plug type and certification basis differ. CCC (based on GB 4943.1) is not recognised in Montenegro.
summary.zh: 黑山使用230V/50Hz市电，插头类型为C型和F型（Schuko），与欧洲大陆标准一致。音视频、信息技术及通信技术设备的电气安全由IEST采用的EN IEC 62368-1（与欧盟EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021保持一致）规范。产品须按该标准测试认证方可进入黑山市场。为中国市场设计的电源适配器（220V/50Hz/A型或I型插头）需进行适配；市电电压范围差异较小（220V对230V标称），但插头类型和认证依据不同。基于GB 4943.1的CCC认证在黑山不被认可。
summary.zht: 蒙特內哥羅使用230V/50Hz市電，插頭類型為C型和F型（Schuko），與歐洲大陸標準一致。音視頻、信息技術及通訊技術設備的電氣安全由IEST採用的EN IEC 62368-1（與歐盟EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021保持一致）規範。產品須按該標準測試認證方可進入蒙特內哥羅市場。為中國市場設計的電源適配器（220V/50Hz/A型或I型插頭）需進行適配；市電電壓範圍差異較小（220V對230V標稱），但插頭類型和認證依據不同。基於GB 4943.1的CCC認證在蒙特內哥羅不被認可。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11 — Audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment — Safety requirements (as adopted by IEST)
Montenegro: 230 V / 50 Hz mains supply; IEC 60083 Type C (Europlug) and Type F (Schuko) plug sockets
EKIP type approval / market notification application — safety section supported by EN IEC 62368-1 test report

summary.en: China uses 220 V / 50 Hz mains with Type A and Type I sockets (GB 2099.1 / GB 2099.3). Electrical safety for IT and AV equipment is based on GB 4943.1-2022 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1 with national deviations) under the CCC mandatory certification scheme administered by CNCA. CCC test reports use GB 4943.1, which differs from EN IEC 62368-1 in national deviations and plug/socket scope.
summary.zh: 中国使用220V/50Hz市电，插座类型为A型和I型（GB 2099.1/GB 2099.3）。信息技术和音视频设备的电气安全基于GB 4943.1-2022（与IEC 62368-1等效，含国家差异），属于CNCA管理的CCC强制认证范畴。CCC测试报告依据GB 4943.1，在国家差异和插头/插座范围上与EN IEC 62368-1不同。
summary.zht: 中國使用220V/50Hz市電，插座類型為A型和I型（GB 2099.1/GB 2099.3）。信息技術和音視頻設備的電氣安全基於GB 4943.1-2022（與IEC 62368-1等效，含國家差異），屬於CNCA管理的CCC強制認證範疇。CCC測試報告依據GB 4943.1，在國家差異和插頭/插座範圍上與EN IEC 62368-1不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 — Audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment — Safety (IEC 62368-1 with national deviations)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA administered; GB 4943.1 scope)
China: 220 V / 50 Hz; IEC 60083 Type A and Type I plug sockets (GB 2099.1 / GB 2099.3)

gap.en: CCC (GB 4943.1) is not recognised in Montenegro. A new EN IEC 62368-1 safety test report (as adopted by IEST) is required for the Montenegrin EKIP application. If the product already holds EU CE certification with an EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11 test report, EKIP will generally accept it as technical evidence. Plug type must be changed from Chinese Type A/I to European Type C/F (Schuko). The nominal mains voltage difference (220 V CN vs 230 V ME) is within the 10% tolerance of universal power supplies in most modern products. Note that EN test reports satisfy the technical evidence requirement but do not replace the EKIP notification obligation.
gap.zh: CCC（GB 4943.1）在黑山不被认可。EKIP申请需提供IEST采用的EN IEC 62368-1新安全检测报告。若产品已持有欧盟CE认证并附有EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11检测报告，EKIP通常接受其作为技术证明。插头类型须从中国A型/I型更换为欧洲C型/F型（Schuko）。市电标称电压差异（中国220V对黑山230V）在大多数现代产品通用电源的10%容差范围内。请注意，EN检测报告满足技术证明要求，但不能替代EKIP通知义务。
gap.zht: CCC（GB 4943.1）在蒙特內哥羅不被認可。EKIP申請需提供IEST採用的EN IEC 62368-1新安全測試報告。若產品已持有歐盟CE認證並附有EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11測試報告，EKIP通常接受其作為技術證明。插頭類型須從中國A型/I型更換為歐洲C型/F型（Schuko）。市電標稱電壓差異（中國220V對蒙特內哥羅230V）在大多數現代產品通用電源的10%容差範圍內。請注意，EN測試報告滿足技術證明要求，但不能替代EKIP通知義務。

source.publisher: IEST — Institut za standardizaciju Crne Gore (Institute for Standardization of Montenegro)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety certification to EN IEC 62368-1 (as adopted by IEST) is mandatory for audio/video and IT/communications equipment on the Montenegrin market. CCC (GB 4943.1) is not recognised. Products must use Type C/F (Schuko) plugs for 230 V / 50 Hz mains. EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11 test reports from CE certification are generally reusable as technical evidence for EKIP. Verify with EKIP or a qualified local representative before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 音视频及信息技术/通信设备在黑山市场须取得IEST采用的EN IEC 62368-1电气安全认证。CCC（GB 4943.1）不被认可。产品须使用C型/F型（Schuko）插头，适用230V/50Hz市电。CE认证中的EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11检测报告通常可作为EKIP申请的技术证明复用。投放市场前请向EKIP或合格本地代表确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 音視頻及信息技術/通訊設備在蒙特內哥羅市場須取得IEST採用的EN IEC 62368-1電氣安全認證。CCC（GB 4943.1）不被認可。產品須使用C型/F型（Schuko）插頭，適用230V/50Hz市電。CE認證中的EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11測試報告通常可作為EKIP申請的技術證明複用。投放市場前請向EKIP或合格本地代表確認。
